notes: Society6 is CLOSED to new artist sign-ups as of 2026-06-07 (confirmed via their Help Center: "We're not accepting new applications right now") √¢¬Ä¬î this is a platform policy decision, not maintenance. Check back periodically for when they reopen submissions; until then no Society6 uploads are possible.

TeePublic bulk uploader is unreliable (submit buttons cause renderer timeouts); the 'Skip & Cancel' link (GET request) reliably removes stuck designs from the queue without freezing. Single-design uploader also works as a fallback.
Images for TeePublic must be upscaled to at least 1500x1995px (5000x5500px to unlock all product types).

3 TeePublic designs got stuck in the bulk queue and were skipped √¢¬Ä¬î can be re-uploaded individually later: 'Be Yourself - Bold Typography Quote Art Print', 'Embrace Your Journey to Success - Minimalist Diorama Print', 'Elevate Your Brand - Minimalist Product Promotion Print'.
